channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: There is a broken arm chair dumped on the pavement, 1st May
item.description:
Someone had dumped a broken armchair on the pavement on Gerda Road at the Southwood Road end.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Southwood Road, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bin full, 1st May
item.description:
Please empty

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Glassmill Lane, Shortlands, Greater London

item.title: Overflowing wheelie bin, 1st May
item.description:
Has been there for at least 2 weeks

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Shorncliffe Road, Old Kent Road, Greater London

item.title: Rubbish all over pavement, 1st May
item.description:
Has been slowly increasing over the weekend,

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Shorncliffe Road, Old Kent Road, Greater London

item.title: Bin full, 1st May
item.description:

item.title: Collapsed access cover, 1st May
item.description:

item.title: Outside Kilburn bridge pub side entrance, 1st May
item.description:
Filthy rubbish from the pub goers, including clothes

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kilburn High Road, London

item.title: Bikes out of zone, 1st May
item.description:
Bikes are left on pedestrian crossing , double yellow lines , resident parking space

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Elsworthy Road, Belsize Park, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Remove this bin, 1st May
item.description:
Please can you remove this bin? It has been left here. I’m not asking for you to empty the bin, it needs to be taken away. Many thanks.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 80, Linnell Road, Peckham, City of London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Medical waste bin spilled along high street, 1st May
item.description:
Used latex gloves, bandages, wipes, etc along the high street from a knocked down bin.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bexley Road, Northumberland Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Mattress, 1st May
item.description:
Please collect this fly tipped mattress

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Vestry Road, Camberwell, Greater London

item.title: Blocked drain, 1st May
item.description:

item.title: Tree branches down, 1st May
item.description:
Due to high winds on Tuesday tree branches fallen off trees. Now are laid on side of road outside 129, 125,123

item.title: Water leak from pavement, 1st May
item.description:
There has been an increase water overflow from the small manhole on the pavement where people walk. This is a health an safety issue and should be treated as urgent. Regards Chris Coker

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Elmhurst Road, Mottingham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Forest always here, 1st May
item.description:
The forest bike has been reported in this location for a week plus

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Tressillian Road, Brockley, Greater London
